name: magang-hunter
description: src/ ├── assets/          # Gambar, Logo, Icon statis ├── components/      # Komponen KECIL (Re-usable) │   ├── ui/          # Button, Input, Modal, Badge (Atomic Design) │   ├── Navbar.jsx │   └── Sidebar.jsx ├── features/        # Komponen BESAR (Fitur Spesifik) │   ├── board/       # Logic Kanban (Column, DraggableCard) │   ├── jobs/        # Form Tambah Job, Detail Job │   └── stats/       # Chart & Statistik ├── hooks/           # Custom Logic (useJobs, useDragDrop) ├── context/         # Global State (JobContext) - Pengganti Redux ├── services/        # Urusan Data (localStorageService.js, api.js) ├── utils/           # Fungsi Pembantu (formatRupiah, formatDate) ├── pages/           # Halaman Utama (Dashboard, Analytics, Settings) ├── App.jsx └── main.jsx
